Here is the JSON with the "code" key added, aligning each related transcript entry with the lines of code from the given solution:

[
    {"text": "let me just quickly code up the solution", "code": ["class Solution:", "    def maxArea(self, heights: List[int]) -> int:"]},
    {"text": "for that so this is the brute force of n solution let's first initialize our result", "code": ["        res = 0"]},
    {"text": "so i'm going to set our result equal to zero", "code": ["        res = 0"]},
    {"text": "so remember our condition for the loop is while", "code": ["        while l < r:"]},
    {"text": "so let's compute the area again i'm just going to copy and paste it from my above solution because", "code": ["            res = max(res, min(heights[l], heights[r]) * (r - l))"]},
    {"text": "now the part that we have to change though is", "code": ["            if heights[l] < heights[r]:", "                l += 1", "            elif heights[r] <= heights[l]:", "                r -= 1"]},
    {"text": "now all we need to do is return the maximum that we computed", "code": ["        return res"]},
    {"text": "let's see if it actually works this time", "code": ["        return res"]}
]
